title: K-200 Airframe Maintenance Procedure
text:
# K-200 Airframe Maintenance Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-414-B. Revision: B. Type: manual. Author: Dev Patel. Created: 2023-08-11. Last modified: 2024-03-15. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Airframe subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1051, P-1118, P-1030.
